Stories Tagged "Object Legend"

A focused archive path for Object Legend, collecting 5 related Kyunolab records across 2 shelfves.

Mythic Objects

The Lantern That Burns Without Oil: Why Impossible Lights Return in Object Legends

A lantern stays lit after the oil is gone, turning an ordinary object into a quiet test of memory, duty, and fear.

Urban Legends

The Last Locker in the Bus Terminal

A careful reading of the last locker in a bus terminal clicks open at closing time even when no key has been issued.

Urban Legends - 8 min read
Urban Legends

The Vending Machine That Gives the Same Old Coin

A careful reading of a vending machine returns the same tarnished coin to different customers who choose the bottom row snack.

Urban Legends - 10 min read
Mythic Objects

The Key That Fits Every Door Except Its Own: A Mythic Object Record About Refusal

The key works everywhere it should not, then fails at the one door it was supposedly made to open.

Mythic Objects - 8 min read
Mythic Objects

The Mirror That Shows the House Empty: A Mythic Object Record

A mirror reflecting an empty room even while people stand inside it.
